Web Development.name: Sheriyans Coding School
Web Development.bestFor: Students who prefer practical, project-based learning with an active community
Web Development.description: Offers practical web development courses focused on building real-world projects and improving development skills.

Web Development.name: freeCodeCamp
Web Development.bestFor: Beginners who want a structured curriculum with coding exercises and certifications
Web Development.description: A free learning platform offering interactive lessons, coding challenges, projects, and certifications.

Web Development.name: The Odin Project
Web Development.bestFor: Learners who want to build real-world projects and become full-stack developers
Web Development.description: A comprehensive full-stack web development curriculum focused on hands-on projects and modern development workflows.

Web Development.name: Full Stack Open
Web Development.bestFor: Developers who already know the basics and want to master modern full-stack development
Web Development.description: An advanced course covering React, Node.js, databases, testing, and deployment.

Web Development.name: MDN Web Docs
Web Development.bestFor: Developers who need in-depth documentation and professional reference material
Web Development.description: The official documentation for HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Web APIs, and modern web technologies.

AI/ML.name: Google Machine Learning Crash Course
AI/ML.bestFor: Beginners who want to learn machine learning fundamentals
AI/ML.description: A beginner-friendly course covering core machine learning concepts with interactive exercises and real-world examples.

AI/ML.name: Kaggle Learn
AI/ML.bestFor: Learners who enjoy hands-on coding and datasets
AI/ML.description: Short practical courses covering Python, machine learning, data visualization, and deep learning.

AI/ML.name: Machine Learning Specialization by Andrew Ng
AI/ML.bestFor: Students who want a strong theoretical and practical foundation in machine learning
AI/ML.description: A comprehensive specialization covering supervised learning, neural networks, and best practices.

AI/ML.name: fast.ai
AI/ML.bestFor: Developers who want to build deep learning applications
AI/ML.description: A practical deep learning course focused on building real-world AI applications using PyTorch.

AI/ML.name: Papers with Code
AI/ML.bestFor: Experienced learners exploring state-of-the-art AI research
AI/ML.description: A platform linking cutting-edge AI research papers with code implementations, benchmarks, and datasets.

Cybersecurity.name: TryHackMe
Cybersecurity.bestFor: Beginners who want hands-on cybersecurity training
Cybersecurity.description: An interactive platform teaching cybersecurity through guided labs, rooms, and real-world scenarios.

Cybersecurity.name: OverTheWire
Cybersecurity.bestFor: Students who want to learn Linux and security fundamentals through challenges
Cybersecurity.description: A collection of wargames designed to teach Linux, networking, and security concepts step by step.

Cybersecurity.name: PortSwigger Web Security Academy
Cybersecurity.bestFor: Learners interested in web application security and penetration testing
Cybersecurity.description: Free labs and tutorials covering web vulnerabilities like SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, and authentication flaws.

Cybersecurity.name: Hack The Box
Cybersecurity.bestFor: Users who want realistic penetration testing and ethical hacking practice
Cybersecurity.description: A platform featuring vulnerable machines and labs that simulate real-world cybersecurity challenges.

Cybersecurity.name: Offensive Security Learning Library (OSCC/OSCP)
Cybersecurity.bestFor: Professionals preparing for advanced penetration testing certifications
Cybersecurity.description: Industry-recognized training focused on ethical hacking, penetration testing, and advanced offensive security techniques.

DSA.name: Striver's A2Z DSA Course
DSA.description: A complete roadmap covering Data Structures and Algorithms from basic to advanced with practice problems.

DSA.name: GeeksforGeeks DSA
DSA.bestFor: Students who prefer detailed explanations and extensive practice
DSA.description: Comprehensive tutorials, coding problems, and interview preparation resources for Data Structures and Algorithms.

DSA.name: NeetCode
DSA.bestFor: Learners preparing for technical interviews with curated coding problems
DSA.description: A structured roadmap featuring carefully selected coding interview questions with video explanations.

DSA.name: LeetCode
DSA.bestFor: Developers preparing for coding interviews at top tech companies
DSA.description: A leading platform for practicing coding problems across algorithms, data structures, and system design.

DSA.name: Codeforces
DSA.bestFor: Advanced programmers aiming to master algorithms through competitive programming
DSA.description: A competitive programming platform featuring contests, problem sets, and an active global community.
